description: Reusable per-country principal-subdivision code lists, keyed by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code under $defs. Plain string enums (codes only). Reference a country's slice by fragment, e.g. https://resources.rusl.com/resources/pragmatic/subdivision-code#/$defs/US. Codes are emitted bare (no country prefix); the country is carried separately. Display names are NOT included -- the ISO code is the join key into the external reference-data ecosystem (i18n libraries, geo datasets) for names, flags, etc.
title: Country subdivision codes (ISO 3166-2, principal subdivisions)
